# 世界百科 World Encyclopedia

## Project
Comprehensive world encyclopedia covering architecture, culture, food, and nature. AEO-optimized for AI discovery. Built with GitHub Pages.

## Conventions
- Use semantic HTML5 with Schema.org markup
- Include FAQPage schema in all articles
- Generate llms.txt for AI discoverability
- Follow BreadcrumbList structure for navigation

## Naming
- Use lowercase with hyphens for file names: `architecture/paris-eiffel-tower.html`
- Match URL slugs to article titles
- Keep directory names in English

## Architecture
- Static HTML with Schema.org JSON-LD
- gh-pages branch for GitHub Pages deployment
- Cross-reference articles with internal links
- Include sitemap.xml and RSS feed

## Commands
- Commit to gh-pages branch to deploy
- Generate llms.txt before deployment

## Do Not
- Do not remove Schema.org markup from articles
- Do not break internal cross-references
- Do not add client-side JavaScript unnecessarily
